concerns.text: All three primary datasets (Knot Atlas, KnotInfo, OEIS A002863) show 'NO verified source found in block' in the Dataset Strategy table. Per Constitution Principle II (Verified Accuracy), external citations must be verified against primary sources before contributing review points. This is a data resource feasibility blocker—the plan cannot proceed without confirmed accessible URLs for the required knot invariants.

Project Structure shows plots under `data/processed/plots/` but spec.md FR-004 and quickstart.md Step 4 specify `data/plots/`. Per maintainer decision in kickback comments, the SPEC is authoritative: use `data/plots/` for all plot outputs everywhere. Update plan.md Project Structure to match.
